# Component Name Templates

This article describes the available templates in the Telerik Component Name for Blazor:

* [Template 1](#template-1)
* [Template 2](#template-2)
* [Template 3](#template-3)

## Template 1

The Component Name `ComponentTemplate` renders custom content instead of the default Component Name ...

````RAZOR.skip-repl
<TelerikComponent>
    <ComponentTemplate>

    </ComponentTemplate>
</TelerikComponent>
````

## Template 2

The Component Name `ComponentTemplate` renders custom content instead of the default Component Name ...

````RAZOR.skip-repl
<TelerikComponent>
    <ComponentTemplate>

    </ComponentTemplate>
</TelerikComponent>
````

## Example

````RAZOR
<TelerikComponent>
    <ComponentTemplate>

    </ComponentTemplate>
    <ComponentTemplate>

    </ComponentTemplate>
</TelerikComponent>

@code {

}
````
